heading: Domestic disposal programs for dairy products
label: 1446c Domestic disposal programs for dairy products
text: In order to prevent the accumulation of excessive inventories of dairy products the Secretary of Agriculture shall undertake domestic disposal programs under authorities granted in the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938 [ et seq.] and the Agricultural Act of 1949, as amended [ et seq.], or as otherwise authorized by law.7 U.S.C. 12817 U.S.C. 1421
notes: References in TextThe Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 35 (§ 1281 et seq.) of this title.
